final:
module top_module(
  output reg [7:0] op,
  input clk,
  input ce,
  input clr
);always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (clr) begin
      op <= 8'b0;
    end else if (ce) begin
      op <= 8'b00000001;
    end
  end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      op <= 8'b11111111;
    end
  end

endmodule
